mapper.sql: SELECT i.record_id, i.customer_id, i.contact_id, i.opportunity_id, i.lead_id, i.interact_type, i.interact_time, i.content, i.user_id, i.next_time, i.next_content, i.attachment, i.del_flag, i.create_by, i.create_time, i.update_by, i.update_time, c.customer_name, ct.name as contact_name, u.nick_name as user_name FROM mk_interaction i LEFT JOIN mk_customer c ON i.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN mk_contact ct ON i.contact_id = ct.contact_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON i.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mk_interaction (customer_id, contact_id, opportunity_id, lead_id, interact_type, interact_time, content, user_id, next_time, next_content, attachment, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{contactId}, #{opportunityId}, #{leadId}, #{interactType}, #{interactTime}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{nextTime}, #{nextContent}, #{attachment}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: UPDATE mk_interaction SET del_flag = '2' WHERE record_id IN #{recordId}
